text: Code reviews are a vital part of software development. When developers review each other’s code, they can catch bugs early, before the software is released. This saves time and money because fixing problems later is much harder. Additionally, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing within the team. Junior developers learn from more experienced colleagues, while seniors gain new insights from fresh perspectives. This process improves overall team quality and ensures that everyone understands the codebase. Ultimately, regular code reviews lead to more reliable software and a stronger, more collaborative team.
